title: Manifest Printing Utility
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/files' directory in Hadoop MapReduce contains the 'ManifestPrinter.java' utility. It prints manifest file contents to an output stream, aiding in debugging and monitoring. The utility loads manifest data from a specified file using Hadoop FileSystem. It takes a single command-line argument, the manifest file path, and prints data including diagnostics and I/O statistics. This directory follows a utility pattern, providing a tool for system debugging and performance analysis.
